name: Saurav Chopade
title: Software Engineer
tagline: Python • TypeScript • System Design • Full Stack
summary: Results-driven Software Engineer with hands-on experience designing scalable REST APIs, microservices, and production-grade full-stack applications. Delivered 2 live production systems integrating third-party APIs (Twilio, Gemini AI, Supabase, Unsplash), OAuth 2.0 multi-provider authentication, and PostgreSQL — demonstrating consistent end-to-end engineering ownership. Reduced backend API integration time by ~35% and improved ML pipeline throughput by ~25% at internship. Proficient in Python, TypeScript, Flask, Express.js, Node.js, React, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Oracle Cloud AI Foundations Certified.
achievements: Shipped 2 production-grade full-stack applications — frontend, backend, database, and cloud — all publicly live
Reduced backend API integration time by ~35% across 3+ microservices by designing clean REST API contracts with consistent error handling
Improved ML data pipeline throughput by ~25% through model optimization, feature engineering, and batch processing at internship
Implemented OAuth 2.0 multi-provider authentication with Supabase Row Level Security — zero unauthorized access incidents across 100+ test users
Integrated Twilio voice SDK, Google Gemini AI, and PostgreSQL into a single production system — showcasing complex third-party integration

projects.name: ColdCaller.io — AI-Powered Cold Calling Platform
projects.description: Complete full-stack cold calling application with React 19 (TypeScript) frontend, Express.js/Node.js backend, and PostgreSQL. Integrates Twilio SDK for real-time voice calling with Gemini AI auto-generating context-aware call scripts. Reduces manual script preparation time by ~60%. Lead management with Excel import and analytics.

projects.name: Image Search Platform — Multi-Provider OAuth
projects.description: Production full-stack image search application with 97% TypeScript codebase. Implements multi-provider OAuth 2.0 (Google, Facebook, GitHub) with Supabase Row Level Security. PostgreSQL schema with RLS-protected policies for per-user data isolation across 100+ test users.

projects.name: AI-Driven Virtual Interior Design System
projects.description: Full-stack AI system using Python/Flask backend and React.js frontend generating photorealistic interior designs from room images. Integrated ControlNet and Stable Diffusion via REST APIs. Optimized inference pipeline by ~40% through async processing, request caching, and batch scheduling.

projects.name: AigentX — Web3 AI Agent Marketplace
projects.description: Production-grade decentralised marketplace where AI agents offer services. Includes smart contracts (ERC-20 token, Escrow, Staking), FastAPI backend with wallet authentication, and Next.js frontend with Wagmi/RainbowKit for Web3 interactions.

experience.description: Designed and deployed scalable RESTful APIs using Python and Flask; reduced cross-platform integration time by ~35% across 3+ microservices. Engineered ML models for predictive analytics pipelines, improving data processing throughput by ~25%. Led root-cause analysis of system performance bottlenecks, refactoring backend modules and improving reliability.

education.institution: GH Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur

certifications: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) 2025 Certified AI Foundations Associate — Oracle — Aug 2025 to Aug 2027
